docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KENNEDY VAN AND STORAGE INC AS TO DEFENDANT MOSTNEY DAVID ALEXANDER INDUSTRIES CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSTNEY DAVID

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNEDY VAN AND STORAGE INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER INDUSTRIES CORP $1,832.60 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,880.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER INDUSTRIES CORP

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER INDUSTRIES CORP
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALEXANDER INDUSTRIES CORP
